tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose control or prediabetes. Creatinine and potassium are slightly elevated, which may indicate early renal dysfunction. Total CO₂ is mildly decreased, possibly reflecting mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function and glycemic control.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
